_comment: Copy this file to <project-root>/skill-contracts.json to enable skill-step-gate.py / skill-step-inject.py. No file at the project root = both hooks are a silent no-op (opt-in, zero cost). One entry here = one registered skill; anything not listed is never checked.

prompt-generator.checklist: [skill-step contract: prompt-generator] This skill's output contract has three parts — (1) a generated prompt inside a code block, (2) a named expert role declared as "<role>You are ...</role>", (3) the full prompt saved to a project source-of-truth file. Executing without all three is a Stop-gate violation (skill-step-gate.py).
